item.title: SAP 2026 财年第二季度声明
item.summary: WALLDORF, Germany, July 23, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- SAP SE (NYSE: SAP) announced today its financial results for the second quarter ended June 30, 2026. - Current cloud backlog of €22.9 billion, up 27% and up 26% at constant currencies - Cloud revenue up 22% and up 24% at constant currencies - Cloud ERP Suite revenue up 2
